news.title: German yields hit 2-year high as Middle East conflict stokes inflation fears
news.description: German two-year bond yields reached their highest point since July 2024.  This rise occurred as Middle East conflict fears boosted inflation and interest rate expectations. news.title: Global Market: EU opens talks on digital euro rules, eyes 2029 launch
news.description: The European Union has begun negotiations on legislation to create the legal framework for a digital euro, aiming to finalize the rules by the end of 2026. news.title: Türkiye posts current account deficit of $1.46 billion in May
news.description: Türkiye’s current account posted a deficit of $1.46 billion in May, exceeding market expectations, according to data released on July 13 by the country’s central bank.

news.title: Kaiser Reef lifts gold production 8% from Tassie and Vic mines
news.description: Kaiser Reef has poured 6000 ounces of gold across Henty and Maldon this quarter and reaffirmed its 32,000-ounce guidance for 2027, with $37.2M in the bank.

news.title: Kuniko fires up drill bit to chase bonanza NSW gold hit
news.description: Kuniko Limited has resumed drilling at the company’s NSW Commonwealth project, following up on bonanza silver-gold hits from a successful first campaign. Assays are due in September.

news.title: Global Market: European stocks edge lower as Middle East escalation dampens investor sentiment
news.description: The pan-European STOXX 600 index slipped 0.3% to 639.29 in early trade, extending losses after posting its biggest weekly decline since late April in the previous session.
